summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 are partially implemented. REQ-1 updates manifest.json and index.html to reference the user-provided image URL directly, but the image is not downloaded and saved as a local static asset in frontend/public/ — the URL is used as a remote reference instead. REQ-2 targets GlobeView.tsx but the diff is truncated so full removal of the pulsing dot cannot be confirmed, though the file is modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Download the user-provided image and save it as a static asset in frontend/public/; manifest.json icon entries reference the local file path, not a remote URL.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no new file added to frontend/public/ (ADDED FILES: none). Both manifest.json and index.html reference the image via the remote ICP URL directly rather than a locally saved file. The acceptance criteria explicitly states 'The user-provided image URL is downloaded and saved as a static asset in frontend/public/'.
